description: Advanced Software Design Document (SDD) planning and industrial phase management.

protocols.name: phase-density-rule
protocols.requirement: Minimum 5 specs (spec.md + spec.yaml) per planning phase.

protocols.name: library-evolution-loop
protocols.requirement: Mandatory refinement and enhancement of the core library during every phase.

protocols.name: skill-codification
protocols.requirement: Every phase must result in at least one new skill manifest added to .ai/skills/.

protocols.name: autonomous-automation
protocols.requirement: Introduction of at least one new automation script or internal tool per phase.

protocols.name: health-optimization-gate
protocols.requirement: Phase completion requires a performance and library health audit (OMEGA-tier 100/100 target).

protocols.name: command-ergonomics
protocols.requirement: Review and refinement of CLI command logic for efficiency and flow.

protocols.name: profile-expansion
protocols.requirement: Each phase must generate at least 2 new workspace profiles.

protocols.name: invisible-traceability
protocols.requirement: Versioning and git tagging must be executed automatically and silently.
